2026-04-08T18:36:14.4639181Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T18:36:14.4640259Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-08T18:36:14.4645492Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T18:36:14.4646464Z 
2026-04-08T18:36:14.4646796Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T18:36:14.4647253Z
